No Poverty.reason: No explicit evidence in the course syllabus directly addresses poverty eradication or financial inclusion for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3) and aims to enhance students' practical knowledge and career competitiveness (4.4). It also includes a core competence on understanding ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability issues (4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly prepares students for decent jobs in the financial sector, enhances workplace competitiveness (8.5), and strengthens domestic financial institutions by covering talent needs and industry practices (8.10).
